title: Kasam
subTitle: Tanu is enraged after she sees Rishi getting cosy with Tara. Flustered, Rishi tries to convince Tanu and swears his undying love for her. Later, Bani tries to manipulate Rano, as she overhears her and Savitri discuss Pawan and Tanu's alliance.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Rano tells Raj that she wants Tanu as their daughter-in-law as she feels that Rishi is head over heels in love with her. Elsewhere, Pawan thanks Saloni for her convincing act and agrees to get her the diamond set he had promised her.

title: Kasam
subTitle: While everyone is eating the malpua's made by Tanu, Rishi is fasting so that he can get his love. Later, Pawan, Tanu, Rishi and Neha are joined by Saloni as they go shopping for jewellery. While shopping, Saloni and Pawan's actions cause suspicion.

title: Kasam
subTitle: While Neha is busy looking for the heaviest Mangal Sutra, Tanu gets a simple one. Meanwhile, Rishi sees Pawan and Saloni holding hands outside the shop. Later, Tanu stops Rishi from helping her try on a Mangal Sutra, explaining its significance.

title: Balika Vadhu - Kacchi Umar Ke Pakke Rishte
subTitle: Anandi, a child bride, married into an affluent family at a tender age, struggles to cope with the traditions. Soon, she overcomes multiple personal obstacles to emerge as an example for rural women.

title: Balika Vadhu - Kacchi Umar Ke Pakke Rishte
subTitle: Anandi, a child bride, married into an affluent family at a tender age, struggles to cope with the traditions. Soon, she overcomes multiple personal obstacles to emerge as an example for rural women.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Jagdish decides to visit Ganga in Mangalore. It upsets Sumitra, but Kalyani and Gehna send some gifts for her and Mannu. Anandi and Sanchi prepare for the 'Teej' festival.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Jagdish surprises Ganga by his sudden visit. Ganga is overwhelmed to see him and the gifts sent by Kalyani and Gehna. Sanchi gets furious to know that Jagdish has gone to Mangalore to meet Ganga.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Sanchi questions Jagdish about his relationship with Ganga. When all the men are celebrating the festival of 'Teej' with their wives, Jagdish watches Ganga perform all the rituals.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Meenakshi tries to convince Iravati. But Iravati doesn't listen to her, and taunts Sumitra over the phone. Jagdish feels honoured when Ganga greets all his friends, who have come to meet him, warmly.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Anandi and Shiv discuss about choosing a bank for the working class women. The bar owner sends goons to destroy the bazaar setup by Shiv and Anandi. Iravati yells at Shiv and Anandi.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Balachander has his friend enquire about Ganga from a shopkeeper. Iravati asks Jagdish to meet her before going to Jaitsar. However, she doesn't tell Anandi about it.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Balachander tells his friend that he's going to take complete care of Ganga. Anandi contemplates the fact that Iravati and Sanchi hid from her the fact that Jagdish came over to meet them.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Jagdish tells Anandi that he wants to help others. Basant talks to Bhairon about his stressed behaviour. Jagdish is taken aback when Sanchi lashes out on the waiter for spilling water on her card.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Jagdish mulls over Sanchi's immature behaviour and gets worried about the thought of marrying her. Anandi confronts Jagdish about the things he's done for Ganga despite hurting his family.

title: Kasam
subTitle: While Neha is busy looking for the heaviest Mangal Sutra, Tanu gets a simple one. Meanwhile, Rishi sees Pawan and Saloni holding hands outside the shop. Later, Tanu stops Rishi from helping her try on a Mangal Sutra, explaining its significance.

title: Kasam
subTitle: At the jewelers, Tanu and Rishi have an argument about nuptials and rituals. Pawan gifts Saloni a diamond bracelet and Tanu sees them together. Later, Bani tries to bribe the priest to prepone Tanu and Pawan's wedding, but is interrupted by Ahana.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Tanu mulls on telling Rishi the truth, and Raj Singh pokes fun at Rishi for fasting. Pawan sets his hateful gaze on Rishi and walks out, after which he threatens Neha to speak the truth. Meanwhile, Rano sees them together and gets suspicious.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Rishi interrupts Pawan from marrying Tanu and begins the 'Pheras' himself, earning his father's ire. Neha appeals to her mother to stop him but fails. Later, Tanu admits that she loves Rishi in front of everyone. Has Rishi's dream finally come true?
